text:
- `mcp-debug.sh log [n]` — the app's own access log (method, tool name, resource URI, `clientInfo`, sanitized headers) at `.../scratchpad/mcp-debug/mcp-server.log`
- `http://127.0.0.1:4040` — ngrok's inspector, **everything** on the wire including `Authorization` headers and full bodies. I can also pull it programmatically: `mcp-debug.sh requests`

Other commands: `mcp-debug.sh status` (health + URL), `mcp-debug.sh stop`.
